free_text: Complete Hydrogen and Helium particle spectra from 30-
to 60-MeV proton bombardment of nuclei with A=12 to
209 and comparison with intranuclear cascade model
silicon surface barrier dE detectors and a Ge(Li)
Corrected to remove 1st order effects of:
. energy loss of scattered particles in target and
dead layer in Ni window of Ge(Li) detector,
. penetration of edges of detector collimator,
. multiple scattering of secondary protons by dE
. nuclear reactions of hydrogen particles in Ge
For a complete discussion of uncertainties, see ORNL
